implementation_summary.summary: CP00-694 bootstraps the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations package, contract, validator, and descriptor-only scope/domain foundation over 150 planned units from RP23.P00.M00.S01 through RP23.P01.M02.S08 while keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission, audit, Hermes, and runtime surfaces closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-694 RP23.P00.M00.S01-RP23.P01.M02.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
